meta.title: QuizSolver - AI Quiz Solver Extension for Testportal, Moodle and Canvas

hero.title: Solve, understand, and practice quiz questions faster
hero.subtitle: QuizSolver detects questions on supported quiz platforms, suggests an answer, explains the reasoning, and saves study notes so you can practice again later.
proof: Works on Testportal, Moodle, Canvas and more
hero.mockQuestion: Which answer best completes this quiz?

how.title: How QuizSolver works
how.subtitle: No complicated setup. Install the extension, open a supported quiz page, and choose how much help you want.

steps.title: Install the extension
steps.text: Create an account, add QuizSolver to your browser, and sign in once.

steps.title: Open a quiz page
steps.text: QuizSolver detects visible questions on platforms like Testportal, Moodle, Canvas, Google Forms, Kahoot and Quizizz.

steps.title: Solve, explain, or practice
steps.text: Get an answer suggestion, ask for a short explanation, and turn saved history into a practice quiz.

features.title: Built for learning workflows
features.subtitle: The extension is designed to help users understand questions quickly and return to weak topics later.

items.title: AI answer suggestions
items.text: Analyze question text, answer choices, and supported images in one clear workflow.

items.title: Explain Answer
items.text: After solving, generate a concise explanation so the answer is easier to remember.

items.title: Study Notes history
items.text: Save questions, answers, explanations, and status labels for later review.

items.title: Practice Mode
items.text: Select saved questions and generate a clean practice quiz at getquizsolver.com/quiz.

items.title: Smart cache
items.text: Repeated questions can be reused from cache to reduce cost and wait time.

items.title: Permission control
items.text: Known platforms work directly, while optional permissions let users allow trusted pages one by one.

platforms.title: Works across popular quiz and LMS websites
platforms.subtitle: QuizSolver is built around known platform patterns and a safe optional-permission flow for trusted pages.

pricing.title: Simple credits, no confusing plans
pricing.subtitle: Start free with monthly credits, then buy more only when you need them.

mobile.title: Turn solved questions into revision
mobile.subtitle: Study Notes and Practice Mode make QuizSolver more than a one-time answer tool.

steps.title: Save questions automatically
steps.text: Enable Study Notes in extension settings to keep useful questions in your account history.

steps.title: Mark your confidence
steps.text: Label notes as new, learning, mastered, or favorite so revision stays organized.

steps.title: Build a practice quiz
steps.text: Pick questions from history and practice them in a clean quiz view.

leaderboard.title: Top Solvers
leaderboard.subtitle: The most active QuizSolver users this month.

faq.question: What is QuizSolver?
faq.answer: QuizSolver is an AI quiz solver browser extension built for practice, answer explanations, Study Notes, and revision on supported quiz platforms.

faq.question: Is English the main language of getquizsolver.com?
faq.answer: Yes. English is the default language on the main URLs. Polish is available as a secondary version under /pl/.

faq.question: Which quiz platforms are supported?
faq.answer: QuizSolver has dedicated workflows and SEO pages for Testportal, Moodle, Canvas, Google Forms, Microsoft Forms, Kahoot, Quizizz, and general AI quiz solver searches.

faq.question: Does QuizSolver explain answers?
faq.answer: Yes. Users can request a short explanation after solving and save useful questions into Study Notes for later practice.
